about.title: About
about.description: The EduLink connects EdTech startups, educational institutions, researchers, and investors to build a new generation of intelligent education driven by digital pedagogy, artificial intelligence, and innovation.

programs.title: Programs
programs.description: Our programs designed to accelerate innovation in education.

community.title: Community
community.description: Join a network of passionate entrepreneurs, educators, and innovators.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Send us a message to explore collaboration opportunities within the Tunisian EduLink ecosystem.

footer.description: An ecosystem where education and technology meet to innovate.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.paragraph1: We believe Tunisia has the potential to become a leading hub for intelligent education and educational technologies in Africa and internationally. Through pedagogical innovation, learning sciences research, artificial intelligence, and digital transformation, a new educational ecosystem is emerging to reinvent teaching, training, and student support.
vision.paragraph3: to support EduLink startups, educational institutions, and innovative project leaders in building high-impact digital solutions. Through training programs, mentorship, conferences, webinars, and entrepreneurial support initiatives, the Collider helps transform ideas into EdTech startups capable of modernizing education and training through intelligent technologies and artificial intelligence.

team.title: Meet Our Team
team.description: Passionate experts building the future of education technology

sonia.bio: Computer science lecturer and instructional engineering expert, Sonia Sahli is the creator of SonyPlanner. Her expertise in UI/UX Design and collaborations with several European universities reflect her commitment to educational innovation.

denis.bio: University professor and president of Graasp.org, Denis Gillet leads the Interaction Systems Group at EPFL. He is a member of the IEEE Education Committee and co-founder of the Swiss  EdTech Development Network.

thierry.bio: Expert in higher education pedagogy and digital innovation with nearly thirty years of experience. Thierry Spriet actively contributes to the digital transformation of higher education.

ahmed.bio: Full-stack developer specialized in AI, cybersecurity, and scalable web systems. Organizer at GDG Sousse.

maram.bio: Passionate about development and digital technologies, Maram contributes to creating modern and high-performance digital experiences.

features.coworking: An innovation and collaboration space dedicated to EdTech startups, digital pedagogy, and artificial intelligence projects applied to education, fostering creativity, experimentation, and the development of intelligent educational solutions.
features.p2p: Collaborative learning, mentorship, and knowledge-sharing programs focused on pedagogy, AI, digital transformation, educational webinars, and innovative approaches to intelligent learning.
features.ecosystem: An ecosystem bringing together educational institutions, researchers, startups, investors, digital experts, and public stakeholders to promote educational innovation and the goals of SDG 4 – Quality Education.
features.events: Organization of conferences, training programs, webinars, workshops, hackathons, and support initiatives designed to transform innovative ideas into high-impact EdTech startups.
features.collisions: Creating synergies between students, entrepreneurs, researchers, and organizations to accelerate the integration of intelligent technologies, artificial intelligence, and digital solutions into education and training.

testimonials.title: What Our Members Say
testimonials.subtitle: Discover experiences from startups in our Tunisian EduLink ecosystem

t1.quote: Joining the Tunisian EduLink Collider allowed us to connect with key players.

t2.quote: We found a rich ecosystem and strong strategic connections.

t3.quote: A powerful network that accelerated our growth.

t4.quote: A platform that opens doors to mentors and investors.

t5.quote: A huge advantage for accessing key opportunities.

t6.quote: An inspiring place to work and meet innovators.

ripu.label: Flagship Initiative
ripu.title: RIPU 25
ripu.subtitle: Shaping the Future of Education
ripu.description: RIPU 25 is an international initiative bringing together educators, researchers, and innovators to rethink higher education in the age of artificial intelligence and digital transformation, fostering collaboration and shaping the future of learning.
ripu.galleryDescription: Key moments, innovation, networking and community during RIPU 2025. A new edition of RIPU will be announced soon.

smartExam.label: Achievement
smartExam.description: An intelligent examination platform designed to enhance learning through AI-driven insights, adaptive assessments, and personalized education experiences.
smartExam.aiDescription: Advanced artificial intelligence analyzes performance and delivers personalized recommendations for improvement.
smartExam.educationDescription: Built to transform the educational experience with smarter evaluations and adaptive learning systems.
smartExam.awardDescription: Winner of the IEEE Entrepreneurship Competition for innovation in AI-powered education technology.
